zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD维持震荡偏强结构，价格运行于6.72上方并逼近近期高点6.77，短线动能略有增强，但整体仍处于整理上行阶段，多空博弈明显。

均线系统显示价格稳稳站上SMA20（6.62），短期趋势偏多；MACD位于零轴上方并继续扩散，说明多头动能仍在累积，但未出现强趋势加速信号。

下方关键支撑位关注6.62与6.72区间，若跌破可能回踩6.50；上方阻力集中在6.78与6.85附近，突破需放量确认。操作上建议高抛低吸，控制杠杆风险。

交易策略方面，短线可依托6.72附近轻仓做多，若跌破6.62则需止损离场；突破6.78后可顺势追多，目标看6.85上方。执行。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a mild bullish consolidation phase following a period of tight-range movement. Price action near 6.76 shows buyers maintaining control above short-term equilibrium. The overall structure suggests accumulation rather than distribution. Volatility remains compressed, indicating a potential breakout setup. Market participants appear cautious, awaiting stronger momentum confirmation before committing to directional expansion beyond the recent range.

The price trading above the 20-period SMA at 6.6201 confirms a bullish bias, with the moving average acting as dynamic support. MACD reading of 0.0257 reinforces upward momentum, though lack of signal line data limits crossover confirmation. Absence of RSI restricts overbought/oversold assessment, but price behavior suggests neutral-to-slightly bullish conditions. Momentum is building rather than impulsively, indicating controlled buying pressure rather than speculative spikes.

Immediate resistance is located at the recent high of 6.7754, which has capped advances. A breakout above this level could open room toward 6.85 and the psychological 7.00 zone. On the downside, support is found near 6.7232, followed by stronger structural support at the 6.62 SMA20 level. A breakdown below SMA would weaken the bullish structure and invite deeper retracement toward prior consolidation zones around 6.50.

Trading strategy favors range-bound accumulation with bullish breakout bias. Long positions may be on pullbacks toward 6.62–6.70 with risk control below SMA support. Breakout traders can wait for sustained closes above 6.7754 to confirm continuation. Risk management remains essential low volatility, as false breakouts are possible. Overall bias remains cautiously bullish while price holds above the 20-SMA and maintains higher lows.
